title: The National Judicial Appointments Commission Act, 2014
full_text: The National Judicial Appointments Commission Act, 2014 राष्ट्रीय न्याायिक नियुक्ति् आयोग अधिनियम, 2014 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 201440 Act Number: 40 Enactment Date: 2014-12-31 Act Year: 2014 Short Title: The National Judicial Appointments Commission Act, 2014 Hindi Title: राष्ट्रीय न्याायिक नियुक्ति् आयोग अधिनियम, 2014 Long Title: An Act to regulate the procedure to be followed by the National Judicial Appointments Commission for recommending persons for appointment as the Chief Justice of India and other Judges of the Supreme Court and Chief Justices and other Judges of High Courts and for their transfers and for matters connected therewith or incidental thereto. Ministry: Ministry of Law and Justice Department: Department of Justice Enforcement Date: 13-04-2015 Notification: 13th April, 2015, vide notification No. S.O. 1001(E), dated by 13th April, 2015, see Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, sec. 3(ii). TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles The National Judicial Appointments Commission Act, 2014 Show all section Section 1. Short title and commencement. Section 2. Definitions. Section 3. Headquarters of Commission. Section 4. Reference to Commission for filling up of vacancies. Section 5. Procedure for selection of Judge of Supreme Court. Section 6. Procedure for selection of Judge of High Court. Section 7. Power of President to require reconsideration. Section 8. Officers and employees of Commission. Section 9. Procedure for transfer of Judges. Section 10. Procedure to be followed by Commission in discharge of its functions. Section 11. Power to make rules. Section 12. Power to make regulations. Section 13. Rules and regulations to be laid before Parliament. Section 14. Power to remove difficulties.
